name: Groupie
description:
" Around the Flashy, Classy Folk's Walkie Talkie~ "

[ Trash Talkin' - YonKaGor & Kennyoung ]

I don't usually make bots, but... GROUPIE UNLOCKS SOMETHING WITHIN ME. AND THERE WAS NOBODY ELSE TO STEP UP TO MAKE A BOT.

I know that Groupie is non-bi, but i had to give them either a puss or a peen, and i think we both know what i chose

Also added some of my own headcanons for the character, just to give the bot a little bit more to work with!~

Note - if the bot speaks for you, don't complain to me, i can't control that and it's got nothing to do with the coding i gave it, that's just how the AI works for some reason.

THANKS FOR 2K MESSAGES! You guys seem to really like this bot, and i thank you for using it! It really is appreciated that you guys support my creations, which gives me the motivation to keep making more!
creator: Brakura
